title: Flaky Mediterranean Bananas Hash
description: A Mediterranean-inspired breakfast dish featuring fermented flaky bananas, marinated in herbs and spices, served with a crispy hash brown.
instructions: Peel and slice the bananas into 1-inch pieces and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the sliced bananas and cook for 2-3 minutes until golden brown.
In a small bowl, mix together the parsley, oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Add the floured bananas to the bowl and toss to coat.
In the same skillet, add the marinated bananas and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until crispy.
In a separate pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the diced potato until crispy and golden brown.
In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt and red pepper flakes.
Add the yogurt mixture to the skillet with the hash brown and stir to combine.
Add the cooked bananas to the skillet and stir to combine with the yogurt mixture and hash brown.
